utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You know I do not understand why they did not cry . It was a beautiful speech .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I do not understand why they did not cry .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: All that stuff you said about true love , you were right , I mean , we did learn a lot from Mom and Dad !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And that picture of Chi ... Chi with her mischievous grin .

emotion_cause.span: 5_that picture of Chi ... Chi with her mischievous grin .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And what you said about Nana .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ohh , yeah she really would have wanted to be there .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh good God , Ross ! How the hell do you do it ?

emotion_cause.span: 10_How the hell do you do it ?
